# Empowered Healing Counseling

Empowered Healing Counseling is a private therapy practice website for Meaghan Trezza, LMHC in Tacoma, Washington. The site explains therapy services, practice approach, rates, contact options, and curated mental health resources.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/
- About: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/about
- Contact: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/contact
- Rates and Insurance: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/rates-and-insurance
- Somatic Experiencing: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/somatic-experiencing
- Play Therapy: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/play-therapy
- Couples Counseling: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/couples-counseling
- Resources: https://www.empoweredhealingwa.com/resources

## Services and Topics

- Individual therapy
- Trauma therapy
- Anxiety and depression counseling
- Somatic Experiencing
- Play therapy
- Couples counseling
- Telehealth therapy in Washington
- In-person counseling in Tacoma, Washington

## Content Sources

Page copy is managed from JSON files in `public/cms/`. Resource links are managed in `public/cms/ResourceLinks/`. The public site should be treated as the canonical source for visitors.

## Contact

- Phone: (360) 207-5773
- Email: Meaghan@EmpoweredHealingWA.com
- Address: 1310 South Union Avenue, Suite A #302, Tacoma, WA 98405
